name: Get listed on Local.com
description: Learn how to get your business listed on local.com
main_title: Get Listed on Local.com for Your Business
richtext:
Local.com helps consumers discover businesses in their city. Apart from this, it also provides food recipes, wellness advice, and has dedicated sections for answering popular questions about entertainment, finance and shopping. While you list your business for free on local.com, there is also an option to appear on top of search results for the relevant cities as “Featured Listings”. Local.com listings showcase the NAP information, map location and reviews that a business has received on its forum. To list your business on Local.com, follow the below steps.

Multiple content image block

Step 1: Claim your business on Local.com

First, go to Local.com. Then Click on “Claim Your Business Listing” on the top right hand side of the page.

Step 2: Add all your business related information

Next, fill out the given form & pick suitable categories for your business. Add other details like first and last name, business name, email id, contact details, address, etc.  Then Agree to the TOS, & click on “Submit Your Listing”.

Step 3: Confirmation message

Once you submit your listing, you will get an acknowledgement stating your business details will be updated in Local.com upon review.

‍
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence
